label: Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs

node.label: Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs
node.definition: Predictive distributions and belief states express uncertainty rather than only point estimates.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs is to connect Probability theory, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Contrastive learning, Generative modeling, Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives.
examples: substrate for Calibration, uncertainty & risk objectives
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Statistics & experimental design.
